{{Expand}}

{{Infobox spell
| name = Eyes of Malice
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Eyes of Malice]] is a niche pathfinding spell that provides a path for someone looking for the caster with hostile intentions.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c23">''The Engineer'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Spells]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
